description: SQL Injection in /users endpoint — query string built via concatenation of unsanitized 'name' query parameter
Command Injection in /ping endpoint — 'host' query parameter passed to shell via subprocess.check_output with shell=True
SSRF in /fetch endpoint — user-controlled 'url' parameter fetched server-side via requests.get without validation
Path Traversal in /file endpoint — 'name' query parameter joined to base directory without sanitization, allowing traversal outside uploads folder
SQL Injection in /login endpoint — username and password interpolated into SQL query via f-string, enabling authentication bypass
SQL Injection in /search endpoint — 'q' query parameter concatenated into LIKE clause without parameterization
Hardcoded secret key — SECRET_KEY assigned a literal string value committed to source code
